Speak of love. Speak of life. Speak of joy. Choose peace in your body, in your mind, and in your spirit.
Align yourself with your heart. Time is all we really have.
Spend it with those you love and those things you love to do. Be good. Spread good. And good will return to you.
We all go forward together. Light, light, limitless light
Tanda Tajashian
In memory of Tanda Tajashian
